name: Horror Tale 2: Samantha
short_description: Escape a terrifying prison, solve puzzles, and uncover the truth behind the masked kidnapper. Continue the horror story of Tom and Samantha in this intense mystery escape adventure set in 1990s America.
detailed_description:
🎮 Horror Tale 2: Samantha – Continue the terrifying escape story and uncover new secrets behind the mysterious kidnapper.

In the second chapter of the Horror Tale series, you awaken in a cold, locked prison. But you're not alone—Samantha is with you. Work together, solve puzzles, and sneak past danger to escape the clutches of a terrifying villain who’s been kidnapping children in Lakewitch.

Step into the shoes of Tom once again and unravel even darker secrets. The deeper you go, the more you’ll discover about the masked kidnapper and his twisted plans.

🔍 Escape won’t be easy. You'll need to stay quiet, search for hidden clues, solve escape-room puzzles, and explore creepy locations filled with 90s-style atmosphere, fear, and mystery.

🔑 Key Features:

  • 🎭 Original storyline with unexpected twists and animated cutscenes

  • 🧠 Challenging puzzles, hidden objects

  • 🔐 Explore 5 atmospheric locations

  • 👤 Terrifying antagonist with a growing backstory

  • 😱 A tense, story-driven horror escape adventure

  • 🧒 Play as a kid in 1990s America – sneak, survive, and discover

  • 🎧 Original retrowave soundtrack and immersive sound design

    Come to help Samantha escape in this horror tale adventure! 👻

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Swedish, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America, Malay, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
